chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q1_analysis: The paper provides a link to the code repository on GitHub, but it does not explicitly mention reproducibility or provide partial details about the experimental setup.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q2_analysis: The evaluation relies entirely on standard software simulations (ns-3) without physical hardware or large-scale deployment.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q3_analysis: A formal fault model is presented in Section III.B.1, which defines the alive-but-corrupt (a-b-c) failure model and its variants.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q4_analysis: The paper provides a rigorous analysis of the performance trade-offs, including the cost of replication, checkpointing overhead, and energy consumption.

major_weakness: The lack of experimental rigor, as the evaluation relies entirely on standard software simulations without physical hardware or large-scale deployment.
